creator: dewayne.geraghty@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Please close.  This was a stupid entry. Someone on my team created
squid3.4 to take advantage of the kerberos fixes, but its a work in
progress at our end.  I should've checked, but I'd spent too much time
trying to get nss-pam-ldapd-sasl to build a package - which succeeds
after removing man/man* from pkg-plist enables the package to complete. 
Frustration and tiredness. :(
Dewayne.
